title: Limitation of application
doc_html:
§87.  Limitation of application

The provisions of this Part do not in any manner limit, restrict, enlarge, or modify the provisions of Part II of this Chapter, relative to the co-operative marketing law, nor of the law relative to the formation of non-trading corporations.
doc_text:
§87.  Limitation of application
